category_sources: Official GitHub README describes libdeflate as a fast whole-buffer DEFLATE-based compression and decompression library.
source_facts.description says it provides optimized DEFLATE/zlib/gzip compression and decompression.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use libdeflate.
docs_sources: Official README contains overview, building, API, bindings, compression levels, and license sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/ebiggers/libdeflate; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README lists supported formats and included command-line programs.
source_facts.description identifies DEFLATE/zlib/gzip compression and decompression.
